mnemonics: WAVES: Workloads, Analyze, Validate, Execute, Sustain
keyPoints: Understand cyclical demand patterns (waves) to anticipate capacity needs
Continuously monitor performance metrics to validate predictions and adjust plans
Proactively scale infrastructure to handle peak loads without over-provisioning for average use
commonMistakes: Planning for average usage instead of peak demand, leading to system failures during traffic spikes
Failing to continuously monitor and adjust the capacity plan as business needs and usage patterns evolve
